summary: Comprehensive testing of Trend Syria app - New sections (Free Shipping, Flash Sales, Best Sellers, Newly Added, Sponsored Products) across Homepage, Products page, and Food page. Fixed syntax error in FoodPage.js. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend sections are working correctly with proper order.

minor.issue: Console shows 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED' - likely external resource issue, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in FoodPage.js line 648: Changed ')}}' to ')}'
All requested sections are implemented and working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new sections are working correctly: Homepage (Free Shipping Banner, Categories, Food Banner, Sponsored Products, Flash Sales), Products Page (Flash Sales with countdown, Free Shipping 🚚, Best Sellers with sales badges, Newly Added with 'جديد' badge), Food Page (City selector, Free Delivery Banner, Stores, Flash Sales, Free Delivery section). Section order on Products page is correct: عروض فلاش > شحنها مجاني > الأكثر مبيعاً > وصل حديثاً. Section order on Homepage is correct: منتجات مُعلن عنها > عروض فلاش.
